modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error encountered during Sitecore login attempt

full_description_text:  
The user attempted to log into Sitecore CM at cm.usd.edu. An error message was displayed during the login process. This issue prevents access to the Sitecore environment. The user requires assistance to resolve this login error.
short_description: Error encountered during Sitecore login attempt
description: The user attempted to log into Sitecore CM at cm.usd.edu. An error message was displayed during the login process. This issue prevents access to the Sitecore environment. The user requires assistance to resolve this login error.
